title: Brain Leech
description:
[jitter]*thunk*[/jitter]

A sharp pain is felt atop your head and a thought stabs into your mind.

[purple][sine]“SHARE KNOWLEDGE???”[/sine][/purple]

You are unsure how to proceed...

options.title: Share Knowledge
options.description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]5[/blue] random cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

options.title: Rip the Leech Off
options.description: Lose [red]5[/red] HP. Gain a Colorless card reward.

notes:
Choosing [gold]Share Knowledge[/gold] opens a card selection screen. You choose [blue]1[/blue] card from [blue]5[/blue] random cards generated from your character's card pool. The selected card is added to your deck.

Choosing [gold]Rip the Leech Off[/gold] deals [red]5[/red] unblockable damage and offers a Colorless card reward with 3 cards to choose from.
